title: New Gift Filters and other new features and fixes

texts: Added Triggers and Effects to E.G.O Gifts. These refer to their conditions and outcomes, and they can be filtered with them on the Gifts page and when choosing gifts when editing MD Plans. They are manually assigned so there may be some mistakes or missing assignments, and some of them may be changed in the future. A site customization option is included to display them when expanding gift details.
Added image cycling when expanding an image on posts or clear records.
Added an option to separate gifts in the main targeted gifts section into different sections when using the tracking mode in MD Plans.
Fixed the factions/tags on identities on their individual pages not handling their styling.
